title: Small-Farmers Baseline
description: At TEROVA and Griffith Foods, we want to better understand your needs so we can provide improved technical support; the information you share will be kept confidential and used only for this purpose. Thank you for your collaboration!

questions.title: Household
questions.details: How many people live in your house?

questions.title: Experience
questions.details: How many years have you been farming?

questions.title: Secondary Crops
questions.details: Other crops you grow

questions.title: Labor Type
questions.details: Who works on your farm?

questions.title: Cultivated Area
questions.details: Land size under cultivation (acres)

questions.title: Annual Production
questions.details: How much did you harvest in the last year? (Quintals)

questions.title: Income
questions.details: Total money received from selling your crops last year (before taking out costs for seeds, labor, or fertilizer)

questions.title: Costs
questions.details: Total money spent on your farm last year (include costs for seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, and hiring workers or equipment)

questions.title: Asset Investment
questions.details: How much money did you spend on buying equipment or improving your farm last year? (Include money spent on tools, tractors, irrigation pipes, or building storage)

questions.title: Sales Channels
questions.details: Where or to whom do you sell your crops?

questions.title: Has LTA
questions.details: Do you currently have a long-term commercial agreement (up to 3 years) with any buyer or company?

questions.title: Has GF Linked LTA
questions.details: Is this commercial agreement with a processor or buyer linked to Griffith Foods?

questions.title: Other LTA Buyers
questions.details: If you have any other long-term agreement with another buyer, please provide the buyer name(s)

questions.title: Buyer distribution
questions.details: Have you identified how your production is distributed among your different buyers?

questions.title: Sold to GF
questions.details: In the last harvest, what percentage of your total production was sold to Griffith Foods (directly or via processor)?

questions.title: Is Aware Terms
questions.details: Are you aware of the specific terms of your agreement (quality, volume, delivery time, price)?

questions.title: Terms Met
questions.details: In the last season, in what percentage did you meet those terms? (Probe: quality requirements, volume commitments, on-time delivery)

questions.title: Certifications Readiness Audit
questions.details: Which certification readiness audit(s) have you participated in the last 12 months?

questions.title: Has Certifications
questions.details: Are you currently certified or verified under any sustainability standard?

questions.title: Certifications
questions.details: Which sustainability standard(s) are you currently certified or verified under?

questions.title: Certification Validity
questions.details: Until which year is your certificate valid?

questions.title: Production Certified
questions.details: What percentage of your total production is certified under the sustainability standard you mentioned?

questions.title: Production Certified Sold to GF
questions.details: Of your certified production, what percentage is currently sold to Griffith Foods?

questions.title: Agro Practices
questions.details: From the following list of good agricultural and regenerative practices, select all the ones you currently implement in your main crop:
questions.options: Soil testing,Compost making,IPM – Integrated Pest Management,Mulching,Cover crops,Water-saving techniques,Intercropping,Shade management,Erosion control,Compost tea,Pruning,Seed selection,Reduced tillage,Agroforestry,Water harvesting,Biological pest control

questions.title: Training Hours
questions.details: How many hours of training have you received in the past 12 months?

questions.title: Economic Model Awareness
questions.details: Do you know what a farm economic model is (farm budget, cost calculation, profit/loss record)?

questions.title: Economic Model Usage
questions.details: Do you currently use a financial/economic model for your farm?

questions.title: Production in Economic Model
questions.details: What percentage of your total farm production is currently included in your economic model?

questions.title: Financial Training
questions.details: Have you received any type of financial literacy training? (e.g., savings, bookkeeping, cash-flow, cost management)

questions.title: Financial Training Year
questions.details: In which year did you last receive any financial literacy training?

questions.title: Financial Training Provider
questions.details: Who provided your most recent financial literacy training?

questions.title: Agro Recommendations
questions.details: From the following agronomical recommendations received in the past year, indicate which ones you currently apply:
questions.options: Pest scouting,Pruning,Fertilization schedule,Soil tests,Compost application,Variety selection,Planting density,Water management practices

questions.title: Advisory
questions.details: Who provided you with technical or agronomic advisory services in the last 12 months?

questions.title: Has Production Diversification
questions.details: Are you currently diversifying your production (cultivating more than one crop or new income-generating activities)?

questions.title: Production Diversification
questions.details: Which additional crop(s) or income activities are you producing?

questions.title: Income from Farming
questions.details: What percentage of your household income is from farming?

questions.title: Has Crop Insurance
questions.details: Do you currently have access to crop insurance or micro-insurance products?

questions.title: Crop Insurance Type
questions.details: What type of insurance product do you use?

questions.title: Natural Cover
questions.details: What percentage of the farm has natural vegetation or living cover?

questions.title: Has Storage
questions.details: Do you currently have access to storage facilities or aggregation centers for your product?

questions.title: Storage Type
questions.details: What type of facility do you use?
